title: Instructions
description: How you tell the agent what to do — persistent guidance files, scoping, and cross-agent compatibility

features.title: Project-level instructions
features.description: Repo-specific guidance files checked into version control (e.g. CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, copilot-instructions.md)

features.title: User-level instructions
features.description: Global personal preferences that apply across all projects for the current user

features.title: Org/managed instructions
features.description: Organization-wide instructions enforced via managed policy or team admin settings

features.title: Path-scoped rules
features.description: Instructions that only apply when the agent works with files matching a glob pattern

features.title: Instruction file imports
features.description: Instruction files can reference or import other files to compose guidance from multiple sources

features.title: AGENTS.md compatibility
features.description: The agent reads the cross-agent AGENTS.md format used by multiple coding tools
